mechanics: BRANDING/UI METADATA (DOCUMENTED from the title screen): the game's full title is 'RotF — THE HOUR OF TWILIGHT' (an expansion/season subtitle, with a red demonic-skull mascot). This ties the whole 'Twilight' theme together (Twilight Necropolis, Twilight Archmage). Main-menu tabs: Editor | Servers | Play | Account | Legends ('Editor' = built-in content/map editor; 'Legends' = a leaderboard/hall-of-legends). Version banner ~'X1.0' / 'Exalt 2019'. A circular ABILITY/SKILL-TREE UI (ringed colored nodes) is shown — the class/skill-tree interface. Trade economy: 'abyss cloak +8k', a 'lode' (Lodestone?) worth '600k+'.
uncertain: Dungeon entries not individually named (montage scale). No boss taunts captured this run (chat = event feed + trade). The skill-tree UI layout seen but not read in detail. 'Hour of Twilight' could be the whole game's title or a specific expansion/season.
confidence: HIGH for the title/branding ('The Hour of Twilight' + menu tabs + mascot) and the Treesmasher/Cube God event spawns (verbatim feed). MEDIUM for the skill-tree UI existence; LOW for biome->dungeon mapping.
